name: ROTATOR CUFF LESIONS
definition: clinical NOT radiographic diagnosis consisting of lateral shoulder pain with abduction and intraarticular impingement = pulley lesions (Habermeyer classification) chronic tendon degeneration with disorganized repair

demographics.Age: lifelong process; 1st stage < 25 years; 2nd stage 25-40 years; complete rotator cuff

dominant_finding: bunching of subdeltoid bursa during abduction of arm
distribution: type III acromion = anterior aspect of acromion hooked inferiorly
discriminating_features: downsloping of acromion in lateral direction
inferolateral tilt of acromion (on AP view)

anterior tilt / low position of acromion
